personas.name: SG SME Founder
personas.icp: Founder/MD of SG-incorporated SME, USD 5-30M revenue, 20-150 staff, considering a pivot or fundraise within 12 months
pains: Strategy decisions made on gut, not data
ChatGPT outputs 'feel slop' to investors
Procurement rejects offshore CI vendors
PSG gate is opaque
Time-poor; cannot run a 9-agent pipeline themselves
personas.current_workaround: ChatGPT Plus / Claude Pro plus a Google Doc; sometimes a freelancer on Upwork

nba.summary: ChatGPT Pro USD 200/mo seat used directly by founder, ~6-8 hrs personal time per CI artefact.

personas.name: HK Mid-Market Strategy Lead
personas.icp: Strategy / corp-dev lead at HK mid-market firm USD 30-100M revenue, often family-business gen-2/3, with HKMA-fintech adjacency
pains: MNC consultancies too slow and too expensive
Compliance asks for documented third-party CI
Need pan-Greater Bay angle, not US-centric data
Internal team lacks SEA depth
personas.current_workaround: Bain/PwC engagement once a year + GLG/Coleman expert calls; otherwise nothing structured

nba.summary: Internal strategy lead at HKD 2.4M loaded comp would otherwise spend 25 hrs/quarter producing this; opportunity cost is the equivalent.

personas.name: In-house Strategy Director (Series B-C)
personas.icp: Strategy / BizOps director at SG/HK-based Series B-C startup (USD 20-80M ARR), reporting to CEO/founder, with 1-3 analyst reports
pains: CEO wants quarterly competitor refresh on a process the team owns
Don't want to be hostage to a CI SaaS subscription
Hiring a senior analyst is SGD 184k+ all-in
Methodology drift across analysts
Board wants reproducible outputs
personas.current_workaround: Junior analyst + Crayon trial + ad-hoc McKinsey friend favours; methodology lives in a Notion doc

nba.summary: Hiring a junior analyst at SGD 8k/mo loaded; redirecting 20 hrs/mo of senior strategist time at SGD 200/hr equivalent.

personas.name: Boutique Consulting One-Shot Buyer
personas.icp: Founder/board member buying a one-time CI artefact for a specific decision (fundraise, pivot, acquisition diligence) — no recurring need
pains: F&S report is too generic, USD 15-25k
McKinsey is USD 200k+ and takes 8 weeks
ChatGPT output won't survive board scrutiny
Need delivered in 5-7 days
personas.current_workaround: F&S off-the-shelf or a SG boutique like Asia Insight / Kadence at SGD 8-20k

nba.summary: Asia Insight one-shot SGD 8-20k project, 4-6 weeks delivery; Frost & Sullivan off-the-shelf USD 3.5-10k.

personas.name: Build-It-Yourself Eng Manager
personas.icp: Eng/AI lead at a SG/HK tech company who wants to fork the template + run it internally; values the methodology IP, not the deliverable
pains: OSS templates are scattered, no canonical FIELD-DICTIONARY
Want methodology I can audit, not a black-box SaaS
Internal procurement easier for one-off license vs ongoing sub
Want to brand outputs internally
personas.current_workaround: Forks CrewAI + LangGraph + Anthropic Agent SDK examples; spends 40 hrs writing their own field dictionary

nba.summary: Engineering team's current cobbled stack: OSS frameworks + LLM tokens + freelance writer + internal time.

tooling_lines.tool: Internal eng time (8 hrs/mo at SGD 200/hr)

pricing_models.name: One-shot project (5-7 days)
pricing_models.rationale: Matches boutique-buyer expectation and AI-sub psychology — a single decision, a single cheque. Anchor against F&S off-the-shelf (USD 3.5-10k) and Asia Insight project tier (SGD 8-20k).

pricing_models.name: Quarterly refresh retainer
pricing_models.rationale: Captures the 'process license' framing — recurring methodology execution. Beats single ChatGPT Pro seat on price-per-artefact when ≥4 refreshes/yr.

pricing_models.name: Annual partnership
pricing_models.rationale: For HK fintech compliance packs and inhouse-strategy directors — predictable revenue, deeper methodology customisation.

pricing_models.name: Methodology license (one-time)
pricing_models.rationale: Sells the FIELD-DICTIONARY + agent specs + quality gates as IP for in-house teams to run themselves. Highest-margin revenue line; protects the moat docs.

elasticity_heuristics.evidence: USD 200 ChatGPT Pro is the cliff. Every USD 500 increase above SGD 1,500 sheds ~25% of SG SME interest per 2025 SGTECH founder survey extrapolation. PSG halving the price is a step-function reversal.

Anchored on Bain / PwC SGD 250k+ ceiling on the high end and ChatGPT Pro on the low end — a wide medium band. HK buyers are less price-sensitive than SG by ~60% on avg ticket per consultancy.asia 2025 data.
Replaces hiring decisions (SGD 184k+ analyst). A USD 25k retainer for methodology execution that the team owns is functionally inelastic against an SGD 184k+ counterfactual.
Anchored against F&S (USD 15-25k) on top and Asia Insight (SGD 8-20k) below. Will pay SGD 5k for similar shape if delivered in 5-7 days vs F&S 4-6 weeks.
License is one-shot capex, not opex. Internal procurement compares against engineer time (40+ hrs to roll their own); USD 18k methodology license clears at any reasonable WTP given the alternative.

recommended_tiers.name: Starter
recommended_tiers.psychological_anchor: Half a single ChatGPT Pro annual seat. Below the price of a senior consultant for one day.

recommended_tiers.name: Standard
recommended_tiers.psychological_anchor: Half of an Asia Insight project, in 1/4 the time.

recommended_tiers.name: Enterprise
recommended_tiers.psychological_anchor: 1/20th of a Bain engagement, with a Singapore Pte Ltd accountability contract.

recommended_tiers.name: Annual Partner
recommended_tiers.psychological_anchor: 1/4 the cost of hiring a junior analyst, with the methodology you actually keep.

grants.name: PSG (Productivity Solutions Grant)
grants.eligibility: SG-registered SME, must use IMDA pre-approved solution. Elitez Vantage submission to IMDA is the Y1 critical path.

grants.name: EDG (Enterprise Development Grant)
grants.eligibility: SG-registered SME, project-based — qualifies under 'Strategic Brand & Marketing Development' or 'Business Strategy Development' pillars. Customer-led submission.

grants.name: WSG WDG(JR+) — pre-approved Elitez consultant track
grants.eligibility: Funded under Job Redesign+ when the CI engagement is part of a broader workforce/role-redesign project. Elitez Vantage delivery sits under Elitez group's pre-approved consultant LOA (valid 18 Mar 2026 - 17 Mar 2027).
